name: Savory Braised Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any excess fat from the short ribs.
2. Brown the short ribs well on all sides in a Dutch oven over medium heat (about 30 minutes). Pour off the drippings.
3. Add broth, onion, 1 cup water, peppercorns, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, bay leaf, and dried marjoram to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat, cover, and cook slowly for 2 to 2 1/2 hours or until tender.
4. Turn the short ribs onto a serving platter and keep warm. Skim any fat from the cooking liquid.
5. In a small bowl, combine flour with 1/2 cup water to form a smooth mixture. Add this to the cooking liquid, stirring constantly. Reduce heat and cook slowly for 3 minutes.
6. Strain if necessary and serve with the short ribs. Garnish the platter with tomato wedges and parsley.
7. Serve Horseradish Sauce alongside the short ribs.
HORSERADISH SAUCE
1/4 cup Dairy Sour Cream
2 1/2 tsp Prepared Horseradish
1 tsp Prepared Mustard
1/8 tsp Salt
Combine sour cream, horseradish, mustard, and salt in a small bowl. Cover and refrigerate.
